infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Rakshita needs your location to send it with an SOS alert and show nearby incidents.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Rakshita needs your location to send it with an SOS alert.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Rakshita opens the camera in Emergency Mode to capture evidence.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Rakshita records audio in Emergency Mode and for the voice SOS trigger.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Rakshita uses Bluetooth to relay SOS beacons to nearby phones when there's no signal.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Rakshita needs photo access to read an Aadhaar QR code you select.

plugins.cameraPermission: Rakshita opens the camera in Emergency Mode to capture evidence.
